lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

Get ready to own an absolute showstopper! This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. Every detail has been meticulously cared for, from the flawless exterior to the spotless interior. It’s a rare find for anyone seeking a car that truly feels brand new!
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows its age in several areas. The exterior has some visible clear coat peeling on the hood and a few minor door dings and scratches consistent with regular use. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows noticeable wear on the driver's seat and a small crack in the dashboard. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, but the air conditioning is currently blowing weak and the rear tires will likely need replacement within the next few thousand miles. It has been regularly serviced, though it would benefit from a comprehensive tune-up to bring it back to peak performance. This is a solid option for someone looking for a functional vehicle who doesn't mind some cosmetic and minor mechanical imperfections.
This vehicle is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior show no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order and has been maintained according to

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for. The exterior retains a nice finish with only minor cosmetic blemishes, while the interior is clean and comfortable with all electronics in working order. Mechanically, it is solid, offering a smooth ride and reliable performance. It’s a great option for someone looking for a dependable, quality vehicle that is ready to drive.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained to rigorous mechanical standards, the drivetrain demonstrates consistent operational excellence. The interior cabin retains its aesthetic integrity, reflecting a history of careful ownership and attentive care. This offering provides a sophisticated driving experience and remains a testament to the enduring quality of the marque.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable new-to-you ride? I'm parting with my car and it has been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect choice if you want a dependable vehicle that still looks and feels great on the road. It runs beautifully and is totally ready for its next adventure with you. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great home!

Available is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. Power is delivered through a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable limited-slip differential. This chassis has undergone critical rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. The suspension has been upgraded with Bilstein B16 adjustable dampers for improved turn-in and roll stiffness. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive valve clearance adjustment, ensuring the valvetrain operates at peak volumetric efficiency. A performance-oriented driver's car with sorted mechanicals.
Clean title. Reliable engine. Interior is well-maintained. Minor exterior scratches. Service records available.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful use, while the original alloy wheels remain sharp and free of significant scuffs. Inside, the cabin is a non-smoker’s sanctuary, boasting supple leather seating with minimal creasing and a pristine dashboard. All electronics, including the high-fidelity sound system and dual-zone climate control, function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car has been serviced ahead of schedule; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. With a recent full-synthetic oil change and tires showing significant tread life, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with total confidence. It represents exceptional value for a driver seeking a high-quality, dependable vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a comprehensive service history and robust mechanical integrity, it offers a superior combination of performance and value. Its refined exterior and well-preserved interior cabin underscore a commitment to quality upkeep, making it an exceptional acquisition in the pre-owned market.

This vehicle represents a sophisticated balance of performance and value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it exhibits a well-preserved exterior and a clean, functional interior. It remains a prime example of its class, offering the reliability and prestige expected of a premium pre-owned selection. This motorcar is prepared for immediate delivery to a discerning owner who prioritizes both integrity and mechanical excellence.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-taken care of, so it’s totally ready for its next adventure with you! It runs beautifully and is super reliable for daily commutes or weekend getaways. I’m sad to see it go, but I know you’re going to love it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering 414 hp with a linear power band up to an 8,400 RPM redline. Mated to a precise 6-speed manual gearbox, the drivetrain remains robust with recent preventative rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators. The chassis retains its composure via an M-tuned suspension and a functional M Variable Differential Lock for optimal longitudinal and lateral dynamics. The hydraulic steering rack offers excellent feedback, and the braking system utilizes cross-drilled rotors for consistent thermal
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean title. Minor exterior wear. Reliable daily driver.

This 2017 BMW M240i is a standout example of a driver-focused coupe, offering an exceptional balance of daily comfort and spirited performance. Finished in Mineral Grey Metallic, the exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though a few minor stone chips on the front fascia are present from careful road use. The interior is a smoke-free environment featuring Black Dakota leather that remains supple and well-preserved, with only minimal wear visible on the driver’s side bolster. Every feature, from the Harmon Kardon premium sound system to the intuitive iDrive navigation, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the vehicle is in excellent health; it has been maintained with a 'no-expense-spared' philosophy, supported by a comprehensive service history. A recent professional inspection and oil service were just completed, and the Michelin Pilot Super Sport tires show significant remaining tread. The turbocharged inline-six engine delivers smooth, robust power, and the suspension remains tight and responsive. This is a thoroughly maintained, honest vehicle that is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure its mechanical integrity and aesthetic standards align with our dealership's exacting criteria. Prospective buyers will appreciate the well-preserved interior and the reliability of a drivetrain that has been cared for with consistent attention to detail. This is an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a premium automotive experience and proven durability.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and enduring quality. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this selection represents an outstanding value for the discerning professional seeking reliability without compromise.

Hey there! If you're looking for a reliable ride that still looks great and drives even better, you've found it! This car has been so good to me and is in really solid shape, perfect for someone who wants quality without the brand-new price tag. It's super clean, runs smoothly, and is totally ready for all your upcoming road trips. I’m sad to see it go, but I know it'll make its next owner very happy. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of the high-revving S54 platform. The 3.2L inline-six features individual throttle bodies and a double-VANOS system that has been recently serviced to ensure precise valve timing across the powerband. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to an M Variable limited-slip differential. Crucially, the rear subframe has been reinforced and the rod bearings have been addressed, mitigating the primary structural and internal concerns of this chassis. The suspension retains its factory-spec MacPherson strut and multi-link geometry, providing the communicative handling and neutral balance expected of a true M-car. It represents a driver-focused machine with all major preventative maintenance items completed.
Clean title. Well-maintained. Interior and exterior in solid shape. Runs well. No major issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between everyday utility and refined comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and well-preserved, featuring plush seating and fully functional electronics that ensure a premium experience for every passenger. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a documented history of regular servicing that translates to a smooth, quiet, and responsive ride. It is a reliable, turn-key option for a buyer who values both presentation and performance.

This distinguished vehicle represents a superb opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering a seamless blend of proven performance and refined aesthetics. Meticulously maintained and thoroughly vetted by our expert technicians, it delivers a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. A premier choice for those who demand mechanical integrity and lasting value in their next automotive investment.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been curated for its mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it stands as a testament to conscientious ownership and consistent maintenance. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber addition to their collection.

Hey there! If you're looking for a reliable ride that’s been really well-loved, you’ve found it! This car is in great shape and has plenty of life left in it. It’s super comfortable, drives smoothly, and I’ve taken really good care of it over the years. Perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This E92-generation M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, utilizing individual throttle bodies and a cross-bank exhaust manifold to achieve an 8,400 RPM redline. Power is delivered via a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M Differential Lock, ensuring optimal torque vectoring across the rear axle. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from aluminum subframes and functional Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for adjustable damping rates. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator servicing, ensuring mechanical integrity. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with a driver's car, the vehicle remains a visceral performance icon with a linear power band and exceptional turn-in response.
Clean title. Mechanically sound. Minimal cosmetic wear. Ready for immediate use.
